text.title: C# Clean Architecture + CQRS Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to scaffold a Clean Architecture + CQRS .NET solution end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-solution
step.action: Create 4 projects: `Domain` (classlib), `Application` (classlib), `Infrastructure` (classlib), `Api` (webapi). Add project references inward only.
step.decision-gate: If layered solution feels heavy for a CRUD app (<20 endpoints), STOP and apply `csharp-dotnet` umbrella instead.

step.name: model-domain
step.action: For each aggregate add entity with private setters, factory method, behaviour methods, value objects, domain events. Expose collections as `IReadOnlyCollection<T>`.
step.output: Domain project with aggregates and invariants
step.decision-gate: If domain ends up with only properties + getters, the methodology does not fit — apply `csharp-dotnet` umbrella.

step.name: add-application-use-cases
step.action: For each use-case create `Application/Features/<Feature>/<UseCase>/{Command|Query,Handler,Validator,Response}.cs`. Wire FluentValidation pipeline behaviour. Domain rules stay in entity calls.
step.output: Application project with one folder per use-case

step.name: add-infrastructure
step.action: Implement repository interfaces from Application using EF Core in Infrastructure. Configure entity mappings with `IEntityTypeConfiguration<T>`. Add MassTransit Outbox for cross-aggregate events.
step.output: Infrastructure project with EF + Outbox wired
step.decision-gate: If any cross-aggregate event is dispatched without outbox, fail per `outbox-for-cross-aggregate` rule.

step.name: add-api-composition-root
step.action: Add controllers (or Minimal API endpoints) that dispatch through MediatR. Composition root (`Program.cs`) registers Application + Infrastructure DI. Reserve MediatR for use-cases with cross-cutting needs.
step.output: Api project boots and serves endpoints

step.name: enforce-arch-fitness
step.action: Add NetArchTest test project that asserts: Domain has zero outward refs; Application has no `Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore`; Infrastructure may reference Domain + Application. Hook into CI.
step.decision-gate: If NetArchTest fails, BLOCK merge — fix the leakage before any other change.
